name: Performage Hat Tricker
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｅｍ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>エンタメイジ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>ハットトリッカー
desc: If 2 or more monsters are on the field, you can Special Summon this card (from your hand). When a card or effect is activated that would inflict damage to you (Quick Effect): You can place 1 Performage Counter on this card (max. 3), then make that effect damage to you 0. When the 3rd Performage Counter is placed on this card, its ATK/DEF become 3300.
mnst_eff: If 2 or more monsters are on the field, you can Special Summon this card (from your hand). When a card or effect is activated that would inflict damage to you (Quick Effect): You can place 1 Performage Counter on this card (max. 3), then make that effect damage to you 0. When the 3rd Performage Counter is placed on this card, its ATK/DEF become 3300.

summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
